team_format: Two-player teams. R1/R3 alternate shot (foursomes), R2/R4 best ball (four-ball).

course_weight_override._note: Team event — individual course fit does not apply. BBI v8.5 individual model is paused for this week.

course_form_name: TPC Louisiana Form (individual, pre-2017 Team switch)
course_notes: Pete Dye design. Water on 14 holes. Team-format event since 2017. Heavy wind potential.
winner_archetype: Two-player teams — chemistry matters more than individual profile. Recent winners: Riley/Hardy (2025), Hojgaard/Hojgaard (2024), Lipsky/Holmberg-Mikkelsen (2023).
bbi_pipeline_action: DEFER — individual BBI v8.5 rankings not meaningful for team-format. Phase 1/THEMIS/OMNIA will log status files but not publish ranked outputs. Pool/DFS operations skipped. Resume Week 13 (Miami Championship, Trump National Doral, 2026-04-30).
